title: Anzu's Additions: Prehistoric Unify
description: A mod addon that adds interesting compatibilities between Fossils and Archaeology and Create. And other mods
body:
![Anzu´s Additions: Prehistoric Unify](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e3ab9410a01aab0e89d1bdceee5cc54abacb02d7.png)

Anzu's Additions: Prehistoric Unify is a work-in-progress addon focused on unifying mechanics from various mods to provide a better prehistoric experience.

The mod's main dependencies are Fossils and Archaeology Revival: Genesis, Create Mod, and Farmers Delight. While technically functional without them, installing them is recommended for a better experience. It also brings several crafting recipes, blocks, and items that will prove useful. But the Anzu's Additions team (just me!) likes to have fun, and the mod has a humorous aspect, including several meme elements and Easter eggs. It also re-implements some elements that have been lost over time.

But that's not all. Anzu's add brings the DNA of a large number of prehistoric creatures, courtesy of the Prehistoric Fauna Mod. You can extract new types of fossils to clone dinosaurs and plants from six of the major geological formations of the Mesozoic Era.

But if paleontology isn't your thing and you're a fan of a cool guy named Alex, now you can clone some creatures from his mods too.
